security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.publisher: Lemuel Blaya, Angelo Diaz, Blessie Mugat — University of Mindanao
bundle.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Lemuel Blaya, Angelo Diaz, Blessie Mugat. All rights reserved.
bundle.shortDescription: Mobile-first console for mmWave 60 GHz radar vital-sign monitoring.
bundle.longDescription: Standalone Windows operator console for the Radar Vital trainer. The installer bundles the Python trainer as a local Tauri sidecar, starts it on loopback, and connects the dashboard to the local API without requiring a manual Python launch. APK builds remain LAN companion clients.
